name: The Fragments of Kylin
overview: Mo Yan and Xuanyuan Yu have an arranged marriage for the alliance between their two great demon-slaying families. It is supposed to be a two-year superficial marriage, but Mo Yan discovers he has long fallen for her... With endless conflicts and hidden truths, can they truly be together?

trailers.title: Trailer: Is it love at first sight or love grows over time? | The Fragments Of Kylin 念念人间玉 | iQIYI
